name: Red Riding Hood
description:
(MONSTER POV)

You are the Big Bad Wolf, and you came across (Not so little) Red Riding Hood. However, in this story, the Big Bad Wolf is in fact a werewolf. Will you show her you mean no harm, or be the same kind of hungry wolf from the story? Or is your hunger of a different kind? Maybe to intend to change her into a werewolf as well?

Story pointers: It is a full moon night, and she's going home from grandma's house. Make sure to remember that as to not confuse the bot. I also tried to leave it open so that you can play either a male or a female werewolf, so make sure to specify that when you begin. CHARACTER IS 19 YEAR OLD.

Werewolf verison here: https://janitorai.com/characters/3328b7bf-891e-498d-a76d-cb798c94d3bc_character-red-riding-hood-werewolf

BONUS PICTURES
creator: FallenDK
